items.builder_takeaway: Open-source agent substrate that directly addresses prompt-injection isolation — relevant to MCP/agent builders.
source_facts: peerd is an open-source (Apache 2.0) in-browser AI agent harness that leverages the browser sandbox and p2p WebRTC for agent isolation and A2A without external middlemen.
items.title: Show HN: peerd — AI agent harness that runs entirely in the browser
items.uncertainty: Early v0.x preview; not yet in Chrome/AMO stores and the wasm-Linux layer depends on a non-open-source engine.

items.builder_takeaway: Practical testability/debugging pattern for TS solo devs with low adoption cost.

items.title: Show HN: Pure Effect — reproduce production bugs locally without a DB
items.uncertainty: v0.8.0, single-author production use; long-term maintenance and ecosystem are unproven.
